# Multi-Elements

- Route: `/global/dev/document-api/apiReference/model/multimodalToVideo`
- Source API mapping path: `/src/docs/apiReference/model/multimodalToVideo/api.ts`
- Source chunk: `https://s16-kling.klingai.com/kos/s101/nlav112918/api-doc/assets/api-Uqk6k5uK.js`

## Endpoint IDs

- `init-selection`
- `add-selection`
- `delete-selection`
- `clear-selection`
- `preview-selection`
- `create-multi-elements`
- `query-multi-elements-single`
- `query-multi-elements-list`

## Endpoint Paths

- `/v1/videos/multi-elements/init-selection`
- `/v1/videos/multi-elements/add-selection`
- `/v1/videos/multi-elements/delete-selection`
- `/v1/videos/multi-elements/clear-selection`
- `/v1/videos/multi-elements/preview-selection`
- `/v1/videos/multi-elements`
- `/v1/videos/multi-elements/{id}`

## Raw API Chunk Source

```javascript
const e={title:{en:"Multi-Elements",zh:"多模态视频编辑"},endpoints:[{id:"init-selection",method:"POST",path:"/v1/videos/multi-elements/init-selection",title:{en:"Initialize Video for Editing",zh:"初始化待编辑视频"},description:{en:"Initialize the original video before using Multi-elements feature. When replacing or removing elements within the existing video, the relevant elements need to be marked in the video beforehand.",zh:'使用"多模态视频编辑"功能时，需先对原始视频进行初始化处理。其中，在替换或删除现有视频中的元素时，需先标记视频中相关元素。'},headers:[{name:"Content-Type",type:"string",required:!0,default:"application/json",description:{en:"Data Exchange Format",zh:"数据交换格式"}},{name:"Authorization",type:"string",required:!0,description:{en:"Authentication information, refer to API authentication",zh:"鉴权信息，参考接口鉴权"}}],requestBody:[{name:"video_id",type:"string",required:!1,description:{en:"The ID of the video generated by the Kling AI",zh:"视频 ID，从历史作品中选择待编辑的视频，仅支持 30 天内生成的视频作品"},notes:[{en:"- Only videos generated within the last 30 days are supported",zh:"- 仅支持 30 天内生成的视频作品"},{en:"- Only supports videos with a duration of ≥2 seconds and ≤5 seconds, or ≥7 seconds and ≤10 seconds",zh:"- 仅支持时长 ≥2 秒且 ≤5 秒，或 ≥7 秒且 ≤10 秒的视频"},{en:"- Related to the video_url parameter: both video_id and video_url cannot be empty at the same time, and cannot both have values at the same time",zh:"- 与 video_url 参数相关，不能同时为空，也不能同时有值"}]},{name:"video_url",type:"string",required:!1,description:{en:"Get link for uploaded video",zh:"获取视频的 URL，上传时传视频下载链接，编辑选区时传接口返回的视频 URL"},notes:[{en:"- Only .mp4/.mov formats are supported",zh:"- 仅支持 MP4 和 MOV 格式"},{en:"- Only supports videos with a duration of ≥2 seconds and ≤5 seconds, or ≥7 seconds and ≤10 seconds",zh:"- 仅支持时长 ≥2 秒且 ≤5 秒，或 ≥7 秒且 ≤10 秒的视频"},{en:"- Video resolution must be between 720px and 2160px (inclusive) in both width and height",zh:"- 视频宽高尺寸需介于 720px（含）和 2160px（含）之间"},{en:"- Only supports videos with frame rates of 24, 30, or 60 fps",zh:"- 仅支持上传 24、30 或 60fps 的视频"},{en:"- Related to the video_id parameter: both video_id and video_url cannot be empty at the same time, and cannot both have values at the same time",zh:"- 与 video_id 参数相关，不能同时为空，也不能同时有值"}]}],responseExample:{zh:'{\n  "code": 0, // 错误码；具体定义见错误码\n  "message": "string", // 错误信息\n  "request_id": "string", // 请求ID，系统生成，用于跟踪请求、排查问题\n  "data": {\n    "status": 0, // 拒识码，非0为识别失败\n    "session_id": "id", // 会话ID，会基于视频初始化任务生成，不会随编辑选区行为而改变，有效期24小时\n    "final_unit_deduction": "string", // 任务最终扣减积分数值\n    "fps": 30.0, // 解析后视频的帧数，在获取选区展示视频时需携参\n    "original_duration": 1000, // 解析后视频的时长，在创建任务时需携参\n    "width": 720, // 解析后视频的宽，暂无作用\n    "height": 1280, // 解析后视频的高，暂无作用\n    "total_frame": 300, // 解析后视频的总帧数，在创建任务时需携参\n    "normalized_video": "url" // 初始化后的视频URL\n}',en:'{\n  "code": 0, // Error code; Specific definitions can be found in "Error Code"\n  "message": "string", // Error message\n  "request_id": "string", // Request ID, generated by the system, used for tracking requests and troubleshooting\n  "data": {\n    "status": 0, // Rejection code, non-zero indicates recognition failure\n    "session_id": "id", // Session ID, generated during video initialization task, remains unchanged during editing operations, valid for 24 hours\n    "final_unit_deduction": "string", // The deduction units of task\n    "fps": 30.0, // Frame rate of parsed video, required when fetching selection preview video\n    "original_duration": 1000, // Duration of parsed video, required when creating task\n    "width": 720, // Width of parsed video, currently unused\n    "height": 1280, // Height of parsed video, currently unused\n    "total_frame": 300, // Total frame count of parsed video, required when creating task\n    "normalized_video": "url" // URL of initialized video\n}'},codeExamples:[{language:"cURL",code:{zh:'curl --request POST \\\n  --url "video_id": "",\n    "video_url": "https://v1-kling.klingai.com/kcdn/cdn-kcdn112452/kling-qa-test/animals-output-5s.mp4"\n  }\'',en:'curl --request POST \\\n  --url https://api-singapore.klingai.com/v1/videos/multi-elements/init-selection \\\n  --header \'Authorization: Bearer <token>\' \\\n  --header \'Content-Type: application/json\' \\\n  --data \'{\n    "video_id": "",\n    "video_url": "https://v1-kling.klingai.com/kcdn/cdn-kcdn112452/kling-qa-test/animals-output-5s.mp4"\n  }\''}}]},{id:"add-selection",method:"POST",path:"/v1/videos/multi-elements/add-selection",title:{en:"Add Video Selection Area",zh:"增加视频选区"},headers:[{name:"Content-Type",type:"string",required:!0,default:"application/json",description:{en:"Data Exchange Format",zh:"数据交换格式"}},{name:"Authorization",type:"string",required:!0,description:{en:"Authentication information, refer to API authentication",zh:"鉴权信息，参考接口鉴权"}}],requestBody:[{name:"session_id",type:"string",required:!0,description:{en:"Session ID, generated during the video initialization task and remains unchanged during editing operations",zh:"会话 ID，会基于视频初始化任务生成，不会随编辑选区行为而改变"}},{name:"frame_index",type:"int",required:!0,description:{en:"Frame Number",zh:"帧号"},notes:[{en:"- A maximum of 10 frames can be marked. That is, up to 10 frames can be used to define selection areas in the video",zh:"- 最多支持添加 10 个标记帧，即最多基于 10 帧标记视频选区"},{en:"- Only supports marking 1 frame at a time",zh:"- 1 次仅支持标记 1 帧"}]},{name:"points",type:"array",required:!0,description:{en:"Click Coordinates, represented by x and y",zh:"点选坐标，用 x、y 表示"},notes:[{en:"- Value range: [0, 1], expressed as percentages; [0, 1] represents the top-left corner of the frame",zh:"- 取值范围：[0, 1]，用百分比表示；[0, 1] 代表画面左上角"},{en:"- Multiple points can be marked at once; up to 10 points can be marked on a single frame",zh:"- 支持同时增加多个标记点，某一帧最多可标记 10 个点"}],children:[{name:"x",type:"float",required:!0,description:{en:"X coordinate [0-1]",zh:"X 坐标 [0-1]"}},{name:"y",type:"float",required:!0,description:{en:"Y coordinate hours\n    "final_unit_deduction": "string", // The deduction units of task\n    "res": {\n      "video": "url", // Video with mask\n      "video_cover": "url", // Cover image of video with mask\n Format",zh:"数据交换格式"}},{name:"Authorization",type:"string",required:!0,description:{en:"Authentication information, refer to API authentication",zh:"鉴权信息，参考接口鉴权"}}],requestBody:[{name:"model_name",type:"string",required:!1,default:"kling-v1-6",description:{en:"Model Name",zh:"模型名称"},enum:["kling-v1-6"]},{name:"session_id",type:"string",required:!0,description:{en:"Session ID, generated during the video initialization task and remains unchanged during editing operations",zh:"会话 ID，会基于视频初始化任务生成，不会随编辑选区行为而改变"}},{name:"edit_mode",type:"string",required:!0,description:{en:"Operation Type",zh:"操作类型"},enum:["addition","swap","removal"],notes:[{en:"- addition: Add an element",zh:"- addition：增加元素"},{en:"- swap: Replace an element",zh:"- swap：替换元素"},{en:"- removal: Remove an element",zh:"- removal：删除元素"}]},{name:"image_list",type:"array",required:!1,description:{en:"Cropped Reference Images",zh:"裁剪后的参考图像"},notes:[{en:"- For adding video elements: This parameter is required; upload 1–2 images",zh:"- 增加视频元素时：当前参数必填，可上传 1~2 张图片"},{en:"- For editing (swapping) video elements: This parameter is required; upload 1 image only",zh:"- 编辑视频元素时：当前参数必填，仅可上传 1 张图片"},{en:"- For deleting video elements: This parameter is not required",zh:"- 删除视频元素时，当前参数无需填写"},{en:'- Use key:value format as follows:\n```json\n"image_list":[\n  { "image":"image_url" },\n  { "image":"image_url" }\n]\n```',zh:'- 用 key:value 承载，如下：\n```json\n"image_list":[\n  { "image":"image_url" },\n  { "image":"image_url" }\n]\n```'},{en:"- The API does not perform cropping, please upload images with subjects already cropped",zh:"- API 端无裁剪逻辑，请直接上传已选主体后的图片"},{en:"- Supports image input as either Base64-encoded string or URL (ensure the URL is publicly accessible)",zh:"- 支持传入图片 Base64 编码或图片 URL（确保可访问）"},{en:"- Important: When using Base64, do NOT add any prefix like `data:image/png;base64,`. Submit only the raw Base64 string.",zh:"- 注意：若您使用 Base64 方式，请不要在 Base64 编码字符串前添加任何前缀（如 `data:image/png;base64,`），直接传递 Base64 编码后的字符串即可。"},{en:"- Correct Base64 format:\n```plaintext\niVBORw0KGgoAAAANSUhEUgAAAAUA...\n```",zh:"- 正确的 Base64 编码参数：\n```plaintext\niVBORw0KGgoAAAANSUhEUgAAAAUA...\n```"},{en:"- Incorrect Base64 format (with data: prefix):\n```plaintext\ndata:image/png;base64,iVBORw0KGgoAAAANSUhEUgAAAAUA...\n```",zh:"- 错误的 Base64 编码参数（包含 data: 前缀）：\n```plaintext\ndata:image/png;base64,iVBORw0KGgoAAAANSUhEUgAAAAUA...\n```"},{en:"- Supported image formats: .jpg / .jpeg / .png",zh:"- 图片格式支持 .jpg / .jpeg / .png"},{en:"- Image file size must not exceed 10MB. Image dimensions must be at least 300px. Aspect ratio must be between 1:2.5 and 2.5:1",zh:"- 图片文件大小不能超过 10MB，图片宽高尺寸不小于 300px，图片宽高比要在 1:2.5 ~ 2.5:1 之间"}],children:[{name:"image",type:"string",required:!0,description:{en:"Image URL or Base64 string",zh:"图片 URL 或 Base64 字符串"}}]},{name:"prompt",type:"string",required:!0,description:{en:"Positive Prompt",zh:"正向文本提示词"},notes:[{en:"- Use the format <<<xxx>>> to explicitly refer to a specific video or image, such as <<<video_1>>> or <<<image_1>>>",zh:"- 用 <<<xxx>>> 的格式来特指某个视频或某张图片，如 <<<video_1>>>、<<<image_1>>>"},{en:"- To ensure optimal results, the prompt must include references to the video and image(s) required for the editing",zh:"- 为保证效果，提示词中需包含视频编辑所需的视频和图片（如有）"},{en:"- Must not exceed 2,500 characters",zh:"- 不能超过 2500 个字符"},{en:"**Recommended Prompt Templates:**\n\n**Adding Elements:**\n- EN: Using the context of <<<video_1>>>, seamlessly add [x] from <<<image_1>>>\n- ZH: 基于<<<video_1>>>中的原始内容，以自然生动的方式，将<<<image_1>>>中的【】，融入<<<video_1>>>的【】\n\n**Replacing Elements:**\n- EN: swap [x] from <<<image_1>>> for [x] from <<<video_1>>>\n- ZH: 使用<<<image_1>>>中的【】，替换<<<video_1>>>中的【】\n\n**Removing Elements:**\n- EN: Delete [x] from <<<video_1>>>\n- ZH: 删除<<<video_1>>>中的【】\n\nNote: [x] or 【】 are placeholders where you should fill in specific content.",zh:"**推荐的 Prompt 模板：**\n\n**增加元素：**\n- 中文：基于<<<video_1>>>中的原始内容，以自然生动的方式，将<<<image_1>>>中的【】，融入<<<video_1>>>的【】\n- 英文：Using the context of <<<video_1>>>, seamlessly add [x] from <<<image_1>>>\n\n**替换元素：**\n- 中文：使用<<<image_1>>>中的【】，替换<<<video_1>>>中的【】\n- 英文：swap [x] from <<<image_1>>> for [x] from <<<video_1>>>\n\n**删除元素：**\n- 中文：删除<<<video_1>>>中的【】\n- 英文：Delete [x] from <<<video_1>>>\n\n注：中文的【】，英文的 [x]，是需要用户填写的部分"}]},{name:"negative_prompt",type:"string",required:!1,description:{en:"Negative Prompt",zh:"负向文本提示词"},notes:[{en:"- Must not exceed 2,500 characters",zh:"- 不能超过 2500 个字符"}]},{name:"mode",type:"string",required:!1,default:"std",description:{en:"Video Generation Mode",zh:"生成视频的模式"},enum:["std","pro"],notes:[{en:"- std: Standard mode, basic rendering, cost-effective",zh:"- std：标准模式（标准），基础模式，性价比高"},{en:"- pro: Professional mode, high-quality, enhanced rendering, better video output quality",zh:"- pro：专家模式（高品质），高表现模式，生成视频质量更佳"}]},{name:"duration",type:"string",required:!1,default:"5",description:{en:"Video Duration (in seconds)",zh:"生成视频时长，单位 s"},enum:["5","10"],notes:[{en:"- Only 5-second and 10-second videos are supported",zh:"- 支持且仅支持生成 5s 和 10s 的视频"},{en:"- To generate a 5-second video, the input video must be ≥2 seconds and ≤5 seconds",zh:"- 如生成 5s 时长视频，输入视频时长需 ≥2s 且 ≤5s"},{en:"- To generate a 10-second video, the input video must be ≥7 seconds and ≤10 seconds",zh:"- 如生成 10s 时长视频，输入视频时长需 ≥7s 且 ≤10s"}]},{name:"watermark_info",type:"object",required:!1,description:{en:"Whether to generate watermarked results simultaneously",zh:"是否同时生成含水印的结果"},notes:[{en:'- Defined by the enabled parameter, format: \n```json\n  "watermark_info": { "enabled": boolean } \n```',zh:'- 通过enabled参数定义，具体格式如下：\n```json\n "watermark_info": { "enabled": boolean } \n```'},{en:"- true: generate watermarked result, false: do not generate",zh:"- true 为生成，false 为不生成"},{en:"- Custom watermarks are not currently supported",zh:"- 暂不支持自定义水印"}]},{name:"callback_url",type:"string",required:!1,description:{en:"Callback URL for Task Result Notification. If configured, the server will actively send notifications when the task status changes",zh:"本次任务结果回调通知地址，如果配置，服务端会在任务状态发生变更时主动通知"},notes:[{en:"- For the message schema, refer to the [Callback Protocol](/global/dev/document-api/apiReference/callbackProtocol)",zh:"- 具体通知的消息 schema 见 [Callback 协议](/cn/dev/document-api/apiReference/callbackProtocol)"}]},{name:"external_task_id",type:"string",required:!1,description:{en:"Custom Task ID",zh:"自定义任务 ID"},notes:[{en:"- A user-defined task ID; it will not overwrite the system-generated task ID, but can be used to query the task",zh:"- 用户自定义任务 ID，传入不会覆盖系统生成的任务 ID，但支持通过该 ID 进行任务查询"},{en:"- Please ensure uniqueness of the task ID within a single user account",zh:"- 请注意，单用户下需要保证唯一性"}]}],responseExample:{zh:'{\n  "code": 0, // 错误码；具体定义见错误码\n  "message": "string", // 错误信息\n  "request_id": "string", // 请求ID，系统生成，用于跟踪请求、排查问题\n  "data": {\n You can choose to query by external_task_id or task_id",zh:"- 创建任务时填写的 external_task_id，与 task_id 两种查询方式二选一"}]}],responseExample:{zh:'{\n  "code": 0, // 错误码；具体定义见错误码\n  "message": "string", // 错误信息\n  "task_status_msg": "string", // 任务状态信息，当任务失败时展示失败原因（如触发平台的内容风控等）\n    "final_unit_deduction": "string", // 任务最终扣减积分数值\n    "watermark_info": {\n      "enabled": boolean\n    },\n    "task_info": { // 任务创建时的参数信息\n      "external_task_id": "string" // 客户自定义任务ID\n    },\n    "task_result": {\n      "videos": [\n        {\n          "id": "string", // 生成的视频ID；全局唯一\n          "session_id": "id", // 会话ID，会基于视频初始化任务生成，不会随编辑选区行为而改变，有效期24小时\n          "url": "string", // 生成视频的URL（请注意，为保障信息安全，生成的图片/视频会在30天后被清理，请及时转存）\n          "watermark_url": "string", // 含水印视频下载URL，防盗链格式\n          "duration": "string" // 视频总时长，单位s\n        }\n      ]\n    },\n    "created_at": 1722769557708, // 任务创建时间，Unix时间戳、单位ms\n    "updated_at": 1722769557708 // 任务更新时间，Unix时间戳、单位ms\n  }\n}',en:'{\n  "code": 0, // Error "task_status_msg": "string", // Task status message, displays failure reason when task fails (e.g., triggered platform content moderation)\n    "final_unit_deduction": "string", // Final unit deduction for the task\n    "watermark_info": {\n      "enabled": boolean\n    },\n    "task_info": { // Task creation parameters\n      "external_task_id": "string" // User-defined task ID\n    },\n    "task_result": {\n      "videos": [\n        {\n          "id": "string", // Generated video ID, globally unique\n          "session_id": "id", // Session ID, generated during video initialization task, remains unchanged during editing operations, valid for 24 hours\n          "url": "string", // URL of generated video (Note: For security purposes, generated images/videos will be deleted after 30 days, please save them promptly)\n          "watermark_url": "string", // Watermarked video download URL, anti-hotlinking format\n          "duration": "string" // Total video duration, unit: s\n        }\n      ]\n    },\n    "created_at": 1722769557708, // Task creation time, Unix timestamp, unit: ms\n    "updated_at": 1722769557708 // Task update time, Unix timestamp, unit: ms\n
```
